Step 2 — Clear Cache & Cookies: ● Chrome: Three dots → Settings → Privacy & Security → Clear Browsing Data → select “All time” + check Cookies & Cached files → Clear data ● Firefox: Three lines → Settings → Privacy & Security → Clear Data Safari (Mac): Safari menu → Settings → Privacy → Manage Website Data → Remove All ● Shortcut: Cmd + Option + E ● Edge: Three dots → Settings → Privacy, Search & Services → Clear Browsing Data → All time → Clear now Mobile (iOS/Android): Phone Settings → find your browser → Clear History/Cache Step 3 — Close and reopen your browser, then head back to www.jackpotdaily.com and log in again. [01:16:08] Ana Erazo: Hey! No worries — a quick browser refresh and cache clear usually fixes most display or loading issues. Here’s how: Step 1 — Hard Refresh: ● Windows/Linux: Ctrl + Shift + R ● Mac: Cmd + Shift + R (or just press F5!) Step 2 — Clear Cache & Cookies: ● Chrome: Three dots → Settings → Privacy & Security → Clear Browsing Data → select “All time” + check Cookies & Cached files → Clear data ● Firefox: Three lines → Settings → Privacy & Security → Clear Data Safari (Mac): Safari menu → Settings → Privacy → Manage Website Data → Remove All ● Shortcut: Cmd + Option + E ● Edge: Three dots → Settings → Privacy, Search & Services → Clear Browsing Data → All time → Clear now Mobile (iOS/Android): Phone Settings → find your browser → Clear History/Cache Step 3 — Close and reopen your browser, then head back to www.jackpotdaily.com and log in again.
